guidance: India wind installs seen 8 GW FY27, 10 GW FY28; Suzlon eyes share gains.
FY26 EBITDA ₹3,022cr +63%, margin 18.1%; volume scale-up to lift profit.
Development pipeline 22-23 GW identified, ~8 GW in advanced stages.
insights: Record FY26 revenue ₹16,679cr; Q4 rev ₹5,468cr +45% YoY, PAT ₹1,114cr.
Order book 5.9 GW, 66% from C&I and PSU customers.
Record deliveries: 830 MW in Q4, 2,456 MW FY26 — highest-ever in India.
975 MW erected awaiting commissioning; 350 MW ready, pending customer readiness.
concall.orderExecution: 5.9 GW book executes over ~2-3 years as commissioning ramps toward record annual volumes.
concall.source: Suzlon Q4 FY26 results/concall, ~May 25 2026; Yahoo Finance, DSIJ, Angel One, sahi.com
